meta.question: Are there deprecated elements under APS Conceptual Design that should be archived?
meta.finalAnswer:
No deprecated elements were found under APS Conceptual Design that should be archived. 

The APS Conceptual package contains 6 part properties (all with composite aggregation):
- 5 with private visibility
- 1 with public visibility

None of these elements have names, stereotypes, comments, or properties indicating they are deprecated, archived, obsolete, or legacy. A thorough search for keywords like "deprecated", "archived", "obsolete", "legacy", "old", and "remove" returned no matching elements within the APS Conceptual Design hierarchy.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Conceptual Design"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Conceptual"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("aPS Conceptual"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Conceptual"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS Conceptual" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Conceptual" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elemName ?typeName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Conceptual" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName }
  OPTIONAL { ?elem rdf:type ?type .
             BIND(REPLACE(STR(?type), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/", "") AS ?typeName) }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?elemName)), "deprecat") || 
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?elemName)), "archiv") || 
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?elemName)), "obsolet") ||
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?elemName)), "legacy") ||
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?elemName)), "old") ||
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?elemName)), "remove"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?elemName ?prop ?propValue WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Conceptual" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName }
  ?elem ?prop ?propValue .
  FILTER(?prop IN (vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance, vocab:Element_ownedComment, vocab:Constraint_specification, vocab:Property_aggregation, vocab:Property_isComposite, vocab:Property_isDerived, vocab:Property_isReadOnly, vocab:MDObject_ID))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?prop), "vocab:"))
}
LIMIT 100

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?elemName ?prop ?propValue WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Conceptual" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName }
  ?elem ?prop ?propValue .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?prop), "stereotype") || CONTAINS(STR(?prop), "deprecated") || CONTAINS(STR(?prop), "archiv"))
}
LIMIT 100

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?stereoInst ?slot ?definingFeature ?slotValue ?literalValue WHERE {
  VALUES ?stereoInst {
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20specification/_17_0_2_3_41e01aa_1392143064422_647369_74364>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20specification/_17_0_2_3_41e01aa_1392137168054_310063_62703>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20specification/_18_0_5_baa02e2_1454144726039_651553_196012>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20specification/_18_0_5_baa02e2_1454144726038_517806_196010>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20specification/_18_0_5_baa02e2_1454144726039_519148_196013>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20specification/_18_5_2_e64033a_1509483171478_913191_65650>
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?stereoInst vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
             ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
             ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?slotValue .
             OPTIONAL { ?slotValue vocab:LiteralString_value ?literalValue } }
}
LIMIT 100

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?elemName ?typeTargetName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Conceptual" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName }
  OPTIONAL { ?elem vocab:TypedElement_type ?typeTarget .
             ?typeTarget vocab:NamedElement_name ?typeTargetName }
  FILTER(?elem IN (
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_17_0_2_3_41e01aa_1392142710236_305470_73760>,
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_17_0_2_3_41e01aa_1392137142089_116596_62540>,
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_17_0_2_3_41e01aa_1389733995717_883632_74913>,
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_17_0_2_3_41e01aa_1389733856826_933567_74515>,
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_18_0_5_baa02e2_1453403119313_412580_147651>,
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_18_5_2_e64033a_1509483171453_703316_65618>
  ))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?elemName ?prop ?propValue WHERE {
  VALUES ?elem {
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_17_0_2_3_41e01aa_1392142710236_305470_73760>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_17_0_2_3_41e01aa_1392137142089_116596_62540>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_17_0_2_3_41e01aa_1389733995717_883632_74913>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_17_0_2_3_41e01aa_1389733856826_933567_74515>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_18_0_5_baa02e2_1453403119313_412580_147651>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/part%20property/_18_5_2_e64033a_1509483171453_703316_65618>
  }
  ?elem ?prop ?propValue .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?prop), "name") || CONTAINS(STR(?prop), "Name"))
}
LIMIT 100

request.reason: After extensive exploration of the APS Conceptual package, I found 6 part properties (5 private, 1 public visibility), all with composite aggregation. None of the elements have names or properties indicating they are deprecated, archived, obsolete, or legacy. No elements with deprecation-related keywords were found in the package hierarchy.

No deprecated elements were found under APS Conceptual Design that should be archived. 

The APS Conceptual package contains 6 part properties (all with composite aggregation):

None of these elements have names, stereotypes, comments, or properties indicating they are deprecated, archived, obsolete, or legacy. A thorough search for keywords like "deprecated", "archived", "obsolete", "legacy", "old", and "remove" returned no matching elements within the APS Conceptual Design hierarchy.
